title: Am I crazy or does Rei Q have school uniforms in 30
display_title: Am I crazy or does Rei Q have school uniforms in 30
wikitext:
[]: Am I crazy, or does Rei Q have school uniforms in 3.0?             Quote Post by yclui » Tue Oct 29, 2013 11:18 am At about 37:27 of 3.33, if you pause the movie you can clearly see that there are school uniforms in Rei Q's cubby hole / shack. Adding to the confusion, there is actually TWO sets of uniforms: the standard one we see in the show, and the one from the episode 26 AU / 3.0 preview Now, what on earth would Rei Q need uniforms for in the 14 year past impact world, I have not the foggiest. Wonder where this all leads. My favourite crack theory is that the episode 26 AU is actually real, but after the head crack / collision Shinji suffers brain damage and lapses into a coma, dreaming about TV / rebuilds. The appearance of the AU uniforms / flashback is a way for the 'real world' to call Shinji back from his coma.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Oct 29, 2013 11:35 am This has been previously pointed out in the details thread. This box, which, next to the school uniformsd also contains some empty medicine jars, is probably stuff from her appartment that Rei took with her, or had brought to her from her old appartment - Even the old appartment name tag is there, with those same random stickers! In any case, ReiQ doesn't seem to be using it, from what we see, she used to go stark naked when she wasn't in her plug suit, and doesn't have a concept of "home clothing" - You tell her to get dressed, and even tough she's not going to do any piloting and has this nice school uniform handy, she puts on the plugsuit. Of course, you could say she merely reached for the nearest clothes, but we never see her wear the uniform, she didn't even bring it inside her room. As for the sweather west, it's probably some weird thing from the time skip/ may have belonged to one of that many, many interim clones... A lot of symbolism could be inferred from how the box, the nametag, and later Shinji's books, remain completely outside that little empty cabin.(Shinji himself doesn't enter either, for fear of stepping on her sleeping bag) There was stuff pointing to the "indentity of Rei Ayanami" outside the chamber, much like ReiQ looks like the Rei we know by her outward appearance, but what is inside both the room and the girl isn't something Shinji ever reaches, or even knows.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Oct 29, 2013 12:00 pm The better question is, why does Kaworu wear a school uniform even though he is never actually shown going to the school? I think the whole point is that in the post third-impact world, they're all kind of scavenging the remains of the past.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 29, 2013 7:26 pm Yeah, this was already discussed in the Things You Noticed thread, and I thought it got its own split/merge... Have to find the exact topic it was split/merged into, since there's so many. If somebody beats me to it, that's fine.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Oct 29, 2013 8:30 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Yeah, this was already discussed in the Things You Noticed thread, and I thought it got its own split/merge... Have to find the exact topic it was split/merged into, since there's so many. If somebody beats me to it, that's fine.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 29, 2013 11:52 pm Alrighty. Quoted here is the particular stuff about Rei. Click my link to see the explanation (and Fuuforufu's quote for the Minna no Eva Fan link). Sailor Star Dust wrote: Still strikes me as weird how 3.0 Rei has the AU Rei uniform from Episode 26/2.0's Next Time Preview. (See the linked images in the quote.)

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Wed Oct 30, 2013 1:18 am The Eva Monkey wrote: The better question is, why does Kaworu wear a school uniform even though he is never actually shown going to the school? I think the whole point is that in the post third-impact world, they're all kind of scavenging the remains of the past.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Oct 30, 2013 3:45 am The Eva Monkey wrote: The better question is, why does Kaworu wear a school uniform even though he is never actually shown going to the school? I think the whole point is that in the post third-impact world, they're all kind of scavenging the remains of the past.

[]:             Quote Post by ProgButterKnife » Sun Nov 03, 2013 2:46 pm I've always had a theory of the moon that appeared to have collected water and atmosphere is the new home for most of humanity, hence readily avaliable rockects for space eva missions. Just a thought with no real evidence to back it up.
